text: EU Defence at Risk of US “Kill Switch” A Brussels think tank warns that over three-quarters of European countries depend on US cloud giants like Microsoft, AWS, Google, and Oracle for critical defence systems. While no literal “kill switch” is confirmed, US legal powers (e.g., the CLOUD Act), sanctions, or withheld updates could theoretically disrupt European military operations, exposing a strategic vulnerability and intensifying calls for EU tech sovereignty. Source: Brussels Times
text_zh: 欧盟国防面临美国“终止开关”风险。一家布鲁塞尔智库警告称，超过四分之三的欧洲国家在关键国防系统上依赖微软、AWS、谷歌和甲骨文等美国云巨头。虽然目前尚未证实存在字面意义上的“终止开关”，但美国的法律权力（如《云法案》）、制裁或停止更新在理论上可能会扰乱欧洲的军事行动，这暴露了战略脆弱性，并加剧了对欧盟技术主权的呼声。来源：布鲁塞尔时报

text: Boko Haram is holding 400+ women and children kidnapped from Ngoshe in Borno State and has given Nigeria 72 hours to pay about £2.7 million in ransom, threatening to execute them if the government refuses. Source: The Telegraph
text_zh: 博科圣地扣押了从博尔诺州恩戈舍绑架的400多名妇女和儿童，并要求尼日利亚在72小时内支付约270万英镑的赎金，威胁称如果政府拒绝，将处决这些人。来源：每日电讯报

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇶 Iraq’s Shiite Coordination Framework has resumed intensive meetings to name a prime minister candidate. The first gathering is at Ammar al‑Hakim’s house. Out of 12 leaders, eight must sign the official letter to the president for the candidate to be commissioned.…" ⚡️ 🇮🇶 Iraq’s Shiite Coordination Framework has nominated Basim al-Badri as its candidate for the position of Prime Minister and the task of forming a government. The nomination comes after weeks of political deadlock following the election of President Nizar Amidi on 11 April. Al-Badri, a senior figure in the Da’wa Party and head of the Supreme Accountability and Justice Commission, had emerged as a consensus technocratic candidate after Nouri al-Maliki withdrew from the race. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇶 伊拉克什叶派协调框架已恢复密集会议，以提名总理候选人。首次会议在阿马尔·哈基姆家中举行。在12位领导人中，必须有8位在致总统的正式信函上签字，候选人才能获得任命……” ⚡️ 🇮🇶 伊拉克什叶派协调框架已提名巴西姆·巴德里（Basim al-Badri）为总理候选人，负责组建政府。此次提名是在4月11日尼扎尔·阿米迪（Nizar Amidi）当选总统后，经过数周政治僵局后做出的。巴德里是达瓦党的高级人物，也是最高问责与正义委员会的负责人，在努里·马利基退出竞选后，他已成为共识性的技术官僚候选人。@wfwitness

text: Visioner 🇨🇳 Security forces receive a strike drone It turns out that in October 2025, a single-seat electric strike aircraft ZR-300 with vertical takeoff and landing was introduced in China. The machine weighs about 450 kg, is capable of carrying up to 200 kg of payload, staying in the air for up to 90 minutes and flying a distance of 300 km. The working radius is 120 km. Control is manual or automatic. As for armament and special equipment, the device can be equipped with a suspended machine gun of 5.56 mm caliber with a firing rate of up to 600 shots per minute + unguided rockets + an electronic warfare system with a suppression range of up to 5 km. At the same time, the platform is modular: instead of weapons, you can install fire-fighting ammunition, means for emergency response or rescue operations. tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇨🇳 安全部队接收攻击无人机。事实证明，2025年10月，中国推出了一款名为ZR-300的单座电动垂直起降攻击飞行器。该机重约450公斤，载荷可达200公斤，续航时间长达90分钟，航程300公里。工作半径为120公里。控制方式为手动或自动。在武器和特殊装备方面，该设备可配备一挺5.56毫米口径的悬挂式机枪，射速高达每分钟600发，外加非制导火箭弹，以及一个压制范围达5公里的电子战系统。同时，该平台具有模块化特性：除了武器，还可以安装消防弹药、应急响应或救援行动设备。推文

text: WarTranslated Citing sources, Bloomberg reports that Ukraine is set to resume oil supplies via the "Druzhba" pipeline as early as tomorrow. According to the agency, technical tests of the pipeline are scheduled for Tuesday. Additionally, the European Union may take a decisive step toward unlocking a €90 billion loan for Ukraine as soon as this Wednesday, April 22. https://www.bloomberg.com/news/articles/2026-04-20/ukraine-sees-druzhba-oil-resuming-tuesday-paving-way-for-loan tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated 援引消息人士的话，彭博社报道称，乌克兰最早将于明天恢复通过“友谊”管道供应石油。据该机构称，管道的技术测试定于周二进行。此外，欧盟可能最早于本周三（4月22日）采取决定性步骤，为乌克兰解锁900亿欧元的贷款。https://www.bloomberg.com/news/articles/2026-04-20/ukraine-sees-druzhba-oil-resuming-tuesday-paving-way-for-loan 推文

text: Visioner 🇷🇺 🇮🇷 Rosatom completes the evacuation of Russian staff from the Bushehr nuclear power plant in Iran On April 20, Rosatom's CEO Alexey Likhachev told journalists that has been completed, with more than 600 people being evacuated, and 20 volunteers remaining at the nuclear power plant. ✨ “Their task is to maintain the infrastructure and stay in contact with the local customer, who, by the way, has also suspended all construction activities,” added Likhachev. Another demonstration that even strategically important projects/constructions can be halted if the opponent has no reason to doubt that you can really deliver a significant strike with military methods. Without vague statements and threats that are then tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇷🇺 🇮🇷 俄罗斯国家原子能公司（Rosatom）完成从伊朗布什尔核电站撤离俄罗斯员工的工作。4月20日，Rosatom首席执行官阿列克谢·利哈乔夫（Alexey Likhachev）告诉记者，撤离工作已经完成，超过600人被撤离，另有20名志愿者留在核电站。✨ “他们的任务是维护基础设施并与当地客户保持联系，顺便说一句，当地客户也已暂停了所有建设活动，”利哈乔夫补充道。这再次证明，如果对手毫不怀疑你真的能用军事手段进行重大打击，那么即使是战略上重要的项目/建设也可以被叫停。没有含糊的声明和威胁，随后推文

text: Open Source Intel Axios Report: “He’s over it. He [Trump] wants it done. He doesn’t like Iran holding control of the Strait over the Middle East… He doesn’t want to fight anymore. But he will if he feels he has to,” an administration official says tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel）Axios报道：“他已经受够了。他（特朗普）想把这件事了结。他不希望伊朗在整个中东地区控制海峡……他不想再打了。但如果他觉得有必要，他还是会打的，”一位政府官员说。推文

text: WarMonitor RT @TheWarMonitor : When you have to kick the President of the United States out of the room in order to carry out a dangerous rescue, it’s time to kick him out of office too. When President Donald Trump learned that two American pilots had gone missing in Iran on Good Friday, he “screamed at aides for hours” and was then “kept out of the room” while his team was given minute-by-minute updates, according to the WSJ https://www.independent.co.uk/news/world/americas/us-politics/trump-screamed-aides-missing-pilots-iran-b2960603.html https://twitter.com/RpsAgainstTrump/status/2045993391180161387/photo/1 - Republicans against Trump tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 转推 @TheWarMonitor：当你为了执行危险的救援任务而不得不把美国总统赶出房间时，也是时候把他赶出办公室了。据《华尔街日报》报道，当唐纳德·特朗普总统得知两名美国飞行员在耶稣受难日在伊朗失踪时，他“对助手尖叫了几个小时”，随后在团队获得实时更新时被“挡在房间外”。https://www.independent.co.uk/news/world/americas/us-politics/trump-screamed-aides-missing-pilots-iran-b2960603.html https://twitter.com/RpsAgainstTrump/status/2045993391180161387/photo/1 - 反特朗普共和党人 推文

text: WarMonitor RT @TheWarMonitor : Bessent telling people to cut their withholding and calling it a “real wage increase” could seriously screw people. It’s not a raise, you’re just getting your own money earlier, and if you get it wrong you could end up owing at tax time. Bessent: I want to encourage everyone out there watching today to change their withholding ... you will get an automatic real wage increase on a weekly or a monthly basis. https://twitter.com/unusual_whales/status/2045986044550565996/video/1 - unusual_whales tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 转推 @TheWarMonitor：贝森特（Bessent）告诉人们削减预扣税并称其为“实际工资增长”，这可能会严重坑害人们。这不是加薪，你只是提前拿到了自己的钱，如果你算错了，报税时可能会欠税。贝森特：我想鼓励今天观看节目的每个人都去更改预扣税……你每周或每月都会自动获得实际工资增长。https://twitter.com/unusual_whales/status/2045986044550565996/video/1 - unusual_whales 推文

text: Visioner ‼️ ‼️ 🇩🇪 BREAKING | WSJ: Germany is redirecting parts of its struggling industrial base—especially automotive suppliers—into defense production. Facing stagnation and rising competition (notably from China), Berlin is pushing factories, workers, and expertise toward weapons manufacturing. Firms like Rheinmetall are expanding rapidly, and auto suppliers are partnering on drones, ammunition, and military systems. The goal is to turn economic weakness into strength by making Germany a central hub for Europe’s rearmament. See the latest updates with us: @visionergeo tweet
text_zh: Visioner ‼️ ‼️ 🇩🇪 突发 | 《华尔街日报》：德国正在将其陷入困境的工业基础（尤其是汽车供应商）转向国防生产。面对停滞和日益激烈的竞争（特别是来自中国），柏林正在推动工厂、工人和专业知识转向武器制造。莱茵金属（Rheinmetall）等公司正在迅速扩张，汽车供应商也在无人机、弹药和军事系统方面开展合作。目标是通过使德国成为欧洲重整军备的中心枢纽，将经济劣势转化为优势。与我们一起查看最新更新：@visionergeo 推文

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡🇮🇶🇺🇸 Despite its obsolesence and limited capabilities the A-10 is still playing a crucial role in Operation Epic Fury. The squadron of Warthogs deployed to the Jordan has been conducting daily strike missions in Iraq against Iran-backed militias. The lower…" ⚡ 🇺🇸 US Department of Defense announced that the venerable A-10 "Warthog" will see its service life extended to 2030, delaying by at least a year its phase out plan. A-10s have played a noticable role in the war in the Middle-East, strafing Iran-backed militias in Iraq. Additional A-10 were deployed to the Middle-East in past weeks. Critics argue that the decision to keep the aircraft in service is harming the US Air Force as it requires heavy maintenance, preventing the purchase of newer platforms. Furthermore, the A-10 is seen as obsolete in its primary role: close air support. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡🇮🇶🇺🇸 尽管A-10已经过时且能力有限，但它在‘史诗愤怒行动’（Operation Epic Fury）中仍发挥着至关重要的作用。部署在约旦的疣猪中队一直在伊拉克对伊朗支持的民兵进行日常打击任务。较低……” ⚡ 🇺🇸 美国国防部宣布，老当益壮的A-10“疣猪”攻击机的使用寿命将延长至2030年，将其淘汰计划至少推迟了一年。A-10在中东战争中发挥了显著作用，扫射了伊拉克境内受伊朗支持的民兵。过去几周，更多的A-10被部署到中东。批评者认为，保留该飞机的决定正在损害美国空军，因为它需要高强度的维护，阻碍了购买更新型的平台。此外，A-10在其主要角色——近距离空中支援方面被视为已经过时。@wfwitness

text: Trump: The Iranian leadership has forced hundreds of Ships toward the United States, mostly Texas, Louisiana, and Alaska, to get their Oil — Thank you very much!
text_zh: 特朗普：伊朗领导层被迫将数百艘船只驶向美国，主要是德克萨斯州、路易斯安那州和阿拉斯加州，以获取石油——非常感谢！

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 U.S. President Trump: The Iranian leadership has forced hundreds of Ships toward the United States, mostly Texas, Louisiana, and Alaska, to get their Oil — Thank you very much! President DONALD J. TRUMP @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国总统特朗普：伊朗领导层被迫将数百艘船只驶向美国，主要是德克萨斯州、路易斯安那州和阿拉斯加州，以获取石油——非常感谢！唐纳德·J·特朗普总统 @wfwitness

text: Trump: I’m winning a War, BY A LOT, things are going very well, our Military has been amazing and, if you read the Fake News, like The Failing New York Times, the absolutely horrendous and disgusting Wall Street Journal, or the now almost defunct, fortunately, Washington Post, you would actually think we are losing the War. The enemy is confused, because they get these same Media “reports,” and yet they realize their Navy has been completely wiped out, their Air Force has gone onto darker runways, they have no Anti Missile or Anti Airplane Equipment, their former leaders are mostly gone (This has been, in addition to everything else, Regime Change!), and perhaps, most important of all, THE BLOCKADE, which we will not take off until there is a “DEAL,” is absolutely destroying Iran. They are losing $500 Million Dollars a day, an unsustainable number, even in the short run. The Anti-America Fake News Media is rooting for Iran to win, but it’s not going to happen, because I’m in charge! Just like these unpatriotic people used every ounce of their limited strength to fight me in the Election, they continue to do so with Iran. The result will be the same — It already is!
text_zh: 特朗普：我正在赢得一场战争，而且是大获全胜，事情进展非常顺利，我们的军队表现惊人。如果你读那些假新闻，比如失败的《纽约时报》、绝对可怕且令人作呕的《华尔街日报》，或者幸运的是现在几乎倒闭的《华盛顿邮报》，你真的会以为我们正在输掉这场战争。敌人感到困惑，因为他们收到了同样的媒体“报道”，但他们意识到他们的海军已经被彻底消灭，他们的空军已经转向更黑暗的跑道，他们没有反导弹或反飞机装备，他们以前的领导人大多已经消失（除了其他一切，这还是政权更迭！），而且也许最重要的是，我们直到达成“协议”才会解除的封锁，正在彻底摧毁伊朗。他们每天损失5亿美元，这是一个不可持续的数字，即使在短期内也是如此。反美的假新闻媒体正在为伊朗获胜加油，但这不会发生，因为我说了算！就像这些不爱国的人在选举中用尽了他们有限的力量来对抗我一样，他们现在在伊朗问题上继续这样做。结果将是一样的——事实已经如此！

text: Open Source Intel Report: Trump administration to ask Lebanon to repeal the law criminalizing contact with Israel. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报报告：特朗普政府将要求黎巴嫩废除将与以色列接触定为犯罪的法律。推文

text: Status-6 (War & Military News) RT @avivector : Today, two Tu-22M3 from Soltsy Air Base, escorted by two Su-35S, conducted a 4-hour training flight over the Baltic Sea and approached Danish airspace. In the area of the island of Bornholm, the group was intercepted by a scrambled pair of Royal Danish Air Force F-35A from Skrydstrup Air Base. In the area of the island of Gotland, the group was intercepted by a scrambled pair of Swedish Air Force Quick Reaction Alert JAS 39 Gripen. Yesterday, two Tu-22M3 (one of which is RF-94149, Red 15) were redeployed from Olenya Air Base to Soltsy Air Base to take part in today’s training mission. One of the two Su-35S from Petrozavodsk Airport was RF-81717, Red 50, from the 159th Guards Fighter Aviation Regiment. tweet
text_zh: Status-6（战争与军事新闻）转发 @avivector：今天，两架从索尔齐空军基地起飞的图-22M3轰炸机在两架苏-35S战斗机的护航下，在波罗的海上空进行了4小时的训练飞行，并接近丹麦领空。在博恩霍尔姆岛附近区域，该编队被丹麦皇家空军从斯克吕斯特鲁普空军基地紧急起飞的一对F-35A战斗机拦截。在哥特兰岛附近区域，该编队被瑞典空军紧急反应警报的一对JAS 39“鹰狮”战斗机拦截。昨天，两架图-22M3（其中一架为RF-94149，红色15号）从奥列尼亚空军基地重新部署到索尔齐空军基地，以参加今天的训练任务。两架苏-35S中的一架来自彼得罗扎沃茨克机场，编号为RF-81717，红色50号，隶属于第159近卫战斗机航空团。推文

text: Open Source Intel IRGC Quds Force Commander Esmail Qaani reportedly was in Baghdad yesterday. He met with leaders of multiple armed factions to coordinate for a potential new round of fighting and pushed for the election of a pro-Iran prime minister. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2046289737321955585/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：据报道，伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队“圣城旅”指挥官伊斯梅尔·卡尼昨天在巴格达。他会见了多个武装派系的领导人，以协调可能的新一轮战斗，并推动选举一位亲伊朗的总理。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2046289737321955585/photo/1 推文

text: WarTranslated Large-scale pollution has been recorded in Tuapse following drone strikes on the oil refinery. A major oil spill has also occurred, with an oil slick approximately 7 km long forming in the sea near the coast. The facility continues to burn. https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2046289319326097441/video/1 tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated：图阿普谢炼油厂遭无人机袭击后，当地记录到大规模污染。此外还发生了严重的石油泄漏，在海岸附近的海面上形成了约7公里长的油膜。该设施仍在燃烧。https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2046289319326097441/video/1 推文

text: Visioner 🇮🇷 🇮🇶 Iranian Quds Force commander, Esmail Qaani, who had not been seen since the Iran war began, has visited Baghdad in recent days to coordinate with Iran-aligned militias ahead of possible renewed fighting with the U.S. and Israel, Kan News reports. ➡️ According to an Iraqi political source, the visit aimed to align these groups and ensure they are prepared if negotiations fail. ➡️ Qaani also worked to influence the selection of a prime minister favorable to Tehran. tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇮🇷 🇮🇶 据Kan新闻报道，自伊朗战争开始以来一直未露面的伊朗“圣城旅”指挥官伊斯梅尔·卡尼近日访问了巴格达，以便在可能与美国和以色列重新爆发战斗之前与伊朗支持的民兵组织进行协调。➡️ 据一位伊拉克政治消息人士称，此次访问旨在协调这些组织，并确保他们在谈判失败时做好准备。➡️ 卡尼还致力于影响对德黑兰有利的总理人选。推文

text: Visioner Will the second round of strikes against Iran begin? https://twitter.com/visionergeo/status/2046287742217400497/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Visioner：针对伊朗的第二轮打击会开始吗？https://twitter.com/visionergeo/status/2046287742217400497/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Iran says it will dispatch negotiators to Islamabad on Tuesday for round two of talks with the U.S., according to the Wall Street Journal. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：据《华尔街日报》报道，伊朗表示将于周二派遣谈判代表前往伊斯兰堡，进行与美国的第二轮会谈。推文

text: Open Source Intel Michigan Democratic Senate candidate Abdul El-Sayed says Israel is “just as evil” as Hamas. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2046284643335364871/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：密歇根州民主党参议员候选人阿卜杜勒·埃尔-赛义德称以色列“和哈马斯一样邪恶”。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2046284643335364871/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel X was down for me tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：X对我来说无法访问了。推文

text: Disclose.tv NEW - EU, UN and World Bank release "Gaza Rapid Damage and Needs Assessment," estimating that Gaza requires $71.4 billion for recovery and reconstruction work in the next decade. https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2046284397607882772/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Disclose.tv：最新消息——欧盟、联合国和世界银行发布了《加沙快速损害与需求评估》，估计加沙在未来十年内需要714亿美元用于恢复和重建工作。https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2046284397607882772/photo/1 推文

text: Israel is buying 12,000 FPV combat drones in a new tender, upgrading from a cheaper 2025 purchase of 5,000 units. The new drones are far more expensive but include better features (like night capability) and stricter requirements for Israeli-made, non-Chinese components. Source: JPost
text_zh: 以色列正在一项新的招标中购买12,000架FPV战斗无人机，这是在2025年以更低价格购买5,000架基础上的升级。新无人机价格昂贵得多，但包含更好的功能（如夜视能力），并对以色列制造的非中国组件有更严格的要求。来源：耶路撒冷邮报

text: Germany is redirecting parts of its struggling industrial base—especially automotive suppliers—into defense production. Facing stagnation and rising competition (notably from China), Berlin is pushing factories, workers, and expertise toward weapons manufacturing. Firms like Rheinmetall are expanding rapidly, and auto suppliers are partnering on drones, ammunition, and military systems. The goal is to turn economic weakness into strength by making Germany a central hub for Europe’s rearmament. Source: WSJ
text_zh: 德国正在将其陷入困境的工业基础（尤其是汽车供应商）的部分产能转向国防生产。面对停滞和日益激烈的竞争（特别是来自中国的竞争），柏林正在推动工厂、工人和专业技术转向武器制造。莱茵金属等公司正在迅速扩张，汽车供应商也在无人机、弹药和军事系统方面开展合作。其目标是通过使德国成为欧洲重整军备的中心枢纽，将经济弱点转化为优势。来源：华尔街日报

text: Russian Geran-2 (Shahed-type) drone hit the home of Ukrainian defense Adviser Serhii “Flash” Beskrestnov. The house was destroyed, and he was injured but survived. He says multiple drones were sent and believes it was a deliberate assassination attempt.
text_zh: 俄罗斯“天竺葵-2”（Geran-2，沙赫德型）无人机击中了乌克兰国防顾问谢尔希·“Flash”·贝斯克雷斯特诺夫（Serhii “Flash” Beskrestnov）的家。房屋被毁，他本人受伤但幸存。他表示当时有多架无人机袭来，并认为这是一次蓄意的暗杀企图。

text: Macron will visit Greece on April 24–25 to renew a defence agreement between the two countries for another five years, with automatic extensions after that. The pact, first signed in 2021, commits both nations to support each other if attacked and included Greece buying French frigates and Dassault Rafale jets. Source: Reuters
text_zh: 马克龙将于4月24日至25日访问希腊，以将两国间的防务协议续签五年，此后将自动延期。该协议于2021年首次签署，承诺两国在遭受攻击时相互支持，其中包括希腊购买法国护卫舰和达索阵风战斗机。来源：路透社
